attachments.fallback: How to Convert OLM File to MBOX? - @mohdkaif002 (Mohd Kaif)
attachments.text: If you are searching for a method to convert OLM files to MBOX, then you can use the <https://www.sysinfotools.com/olm-converter.php|SysInfo OLM Converter Tool>.  It exports all OLM objects emails, contacts, calendars, and more to PST, MBOX, EML, and MSG formats. Key features include unlimited file size support, a date filter, and a preview function. Fully compatible with all Windows operating systems.
attachments.title: How to Convert OLM File to MBOX? [How-to Discussions]
